evidence_excerpt: Two months after the hemorrhage she developed renewed massive neuropathic pain, which was then well controlled with pregabalin and a low-dose antidepressant; under reduction of medication she remained symptom-free up to a follow-up talk about 6 months later.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: “Unter Reduktion der Medikation blieb die Patientin bis zu einem Verlaufsgespräch etwa 6 Monate später beschwerdefrei.”

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Circa 2 Monate nach der Einblutung entwickelte die Patientin ein erneutes massives, neuropathisches Schmerzsyndrom.
…das dieses Mal jedoch mit Pregabalin und einem niedrig dosierten Antidepressivum analgetisch gut beherrschbar war.
Unter Reduktion der Medikation blieb die Patientin bis zu einem Verlaufsgespräch etwa 6 Monate später beschwerdefrei.

notes_on_uncertainty: Follow-up is reported only to ~6 months after diagnosis; no data beyond 12 months. Index time assumed as the admission/diagnosis when the brainstem cavernoma with subacute hemorrhage was identified and a non-surgical management plan was set. Persistent sensory deficit (hypaesthesia) at presentation may have resolved, but this is not explicitly stated; functional status inferred from being symptom-free on reduced medications.
